channel.title: The Breaker Blog — Breaker Tools Pro
channel.description: Practical pricing, strategy, and tooling guides for card breakers.

item.title: Card Breaking Software in 2026: What Serious Breakers Actually Use
item.description: Spinners, overlays, spreadsheets, and all-in-one platforms — what each category really costs, and the six questions to ask before paying for any of it.

item.title: How to Price a Card Break So You Actually Profit
item.description: The exact formula: true total cost, platform fee gross-up, break-even per spot, and the three margin tiers.
